GGCon Talents Workshop/Panels Schedule Event Map Registration FAQ About
Register Now
GGCon Talents Workshop/Panels Schedule Event Map Registration FAQ About

10:00 AM

Doors Open @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Corwin Pavilion doors open! Have your Eventbrite ticket ready for entry.

10:00 AM - 11:00 PM

Artist Alley @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Support local/student artists! Treat yourself to some merch, prints, stickers, keychains, live drawing, & more!

10:00 AM - 11:00 PM

Club Tabling @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Interested in getting involved on campus? Visit club tables at GGCon including Game Development Club, Marginalized Genders in Gaming Club, Cosplay Club, Unforged TTRPG Club, and Magic: the Gathering Club.

10:30 AM

Giveaway @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Gather at Corwin Pavilion to participate in our giveaway raffle.

11:00 AM - 01:00 PM

Overwatch 2 Tournament Finals @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Join our finalists for our Overwatch 2 Tournament happening on our main stage! Also streamed on Twitch.

12:00 PM - 06:00 PM

Voice Actor Signings @ Flying A Studio (UCEN)

Bring your favorite merch, get it signed, and chat with the voices behind some of your favorite characters. Your chance to meet Jon Bailey, Bill Millsap, James Mathis III, Xanthe Huynh, Patrick Pedraza, Cory Yee, Sean Chiplock, Kieran Regan, Nick Apostolides, and Caleb Yen.

12:00 PM - 01:00 PM

From Mondstadt to Inazuma: Genshin Impact Voice Actor Panel @ MUSIC 1145

Join us for an exclusive Genshin Impact panel featuring amazing voice actors: Cory Yee (Gorou), Kieran Regan (Heizou Shikanoin), Patrick Pedraza (Wanderer), and Sean Chiplock (Diluc). Hear firsthand about their experiences in the industry, behind-the-scenes stories from your favorite games and anime, and insights into the art of voice acting. Seating is first come, first served, so arrive early to secure your spot!

12:30 PM

Giveaway @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Gather at Corwin Pavilion to participate in our giveaway raffle.

12:30 PM - 07:00 PM

Smash Ultimate Tournament @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Sign-up to compete in a Smash Ultimate Tournament, partnered with Smash Club! Sign-up here by 1PM on 5/23!

01:30 PM - 02:30 PM

Into the Cinematic Universe: Marvel Rivals Voice Actor Panel

Join us for an exclusive Marvel Rivals panel featuring amazing voice actors: Bill Millsasp (Punisher), James Mathis III (Black Panther), Jon Bailey (Jeff the Land Shark), and Xanthe Huynh (Dagger). Hear firsthand about their experiences in the industry, behind-the-scenes stories from your favorite games and anime, and insights into the art of voice acting. Seating is first come, first served, so arrive early to secure your spot!

02:30 PM

Giveaway @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Gather at Corwin Pavilion to participate in our giveaway raffle.

03:00 PM - 04:00 PM

Voice Your Fears: A Talk with Nick Apostolides and Caleb Yen

Join us for an exclusive Horror Video Games panel featuring amazing voice actors: Nick Apostolides (Leon Kennedy from Resident Evil) and Caleb Yen (Fox Mask from Silent Hill f). Hear firsthand about their experiences in the industry, behind-the-scenes stories from your favorite games and anime, and insights into the art of voice acting. Seating is first come, first served, so arrive early to secure your spot!

03:00 PM - 06:00 PM

VALORANT Tournament Finals @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Join our finalists for our VALORANT Tournament happening on our main stage! Also streamed on Twitch.

06:00 PM

Dinner Served @ Lagoon Plaza

06:00 PM

Giveaway @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Gather at Corwin Pavilion to participate in our giveaway raffle.

06:30 PM - 07:00 PM

Kahoot @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Test your gaming trivia knowledge and win some big prizes at our annual Kahoot game!

07:00 PM - 10:00 PM

League of Legends Tournament Finals @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Join our finalists for our League of Legends Tournament, sponsored by Seasonic, happening on our main stage! Also streamed on Twitch.

10:00 PM

Giveaway @ Corwin Pavilion (UCEN)

Gather at Corwin Pavilion to participate in our giveaway raffle.

11:00 PM

Doors Close

Thank you for coming! See you all next year!

Thank You to Our Sponsors
